en.text: from a compound of G0001 (as a negative particle) and φέλλος (in the sense of a stone as stubbing the foot); smoothness, i.e. (figuratively) simplicity

senses.gloss_en: from a compound of G0001 (as a negative particle) and φέλλος (in the sense of a stone as stubbing the foot); smoothness, i.e. (figuratively) simplicity
